rationale: All four words are present with correct text, white 800-weight caps for SHIP/FAST/BREAK and a larger #FFC400 NOTHING, optically centered with consistent line spacing and nothing clipped. The filmstrip shows a clear staggered punch-in (SHIP alone, then FAST/BREAK fading in, then NOTHING), but the stagger reads closer to ~0.5s than the briefed 0.25s, and the hold occupies roughly tiles 5-10 (~3s) with no perceptible pulse on NOTHING, so the back half feels frozen. The exit is never captured in any tile — the full block is intact at the last tile and simply gone at 100%, so the briefed alternating horizontal fly-out cannot be confirmed and the ending reads as a cut. Typography is clean and high-contrast, though somewhat default; one pacing/exit revision pass would make it shippable.
